## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership weekly sync to discuss hiring, operations, and strategic planning for growth.](https://fathom.video/share/Ac-Y4c8jsyDjoMD9D8H2YzoSXrxvnCMk?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to scale hiring, especially for managing editors and account managers](https://fathom.video/share/Ac-Y4c8jsyDjoMD9D8H2YzoSXrxvnCMk?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Developing more programmatic/templated content approaches to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Ac-Y4c8jsyDjoMD9D8H2YzoSXrxvnCMk?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Planning for a late January offsite to forecast and plan for the rest of the year](https://fathom.video/share/Ac-Y4c8jsyDjoMD9D8H2YzoSXrxvnCMk?tab=summary&timestamp=5544.0)
  - [Exploring ways to leverage human-in-the-loop processes for AI training and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/Ac-Y4c8jsyDjoMD9D8H2YzoSXrxvnCMk?tab=summary&timestamp=5360.0)

## Topics

### Hiring and Capacity Planning
